evals.query: I need a Sienna Platform skill that knows PowerSystems, PowerSimulations, and InfrastructureSystems package boundaries.
A StorageSystemsSimulations.jl change may require a PowerSimulations.jl API update; plan the slice.
Update Sienna website docs that link to PowerSystems.jl stable documentation.
Find which Sienna repo handles power network matrices and inspect its tests.
Run pytest for SDOM and update its benchmark workflow.
Triage a GitLab issue and add the right labels.
Review this Rust optimization code for panics and unsafe blocks.
Design a database schema for generic infrastructure assets.
